title: Say thanks over email
drDigitalIntro:
I just sent you a note in your Mail app — go take a look!
• Click the pencil icon to write me back.
• Type the message exactly as I've written it, punctuation and all.

playgroundTask.instructions: Open the Mail app, click the pencil to compose a new email, and type this message exactly: "Hi Doctor Digital! Are you having a good day today? Thanks for teaching me like 9,003,751 new things!" Then click Send.
playgroundTask.subject: THANKS DOCTOR DIGITAL
playgroundTask.requiredBody: Hi Doctor Digital! Are you having a good day today? Thanks for teaching me like 9,003,751 new things!

drDigitalSuccess: Message received — you made my day! Your typing is getting really precise.
drDigitalHint: Click the pencil icon in the top corner of the Mail app to start a new email. In the message box, type it exactly as shown, including the exclamation points and the question mark, then click Send.
